meaning: n.格兰尼它冰糕(一种意大利的粗制冰糕)
examples: The Wave~Action System, break down ice from a granita texture to a creamy drink profile;
From a crudo of marinated salmon with ginger, shallots and cucumber granita to black angus beef with smoked bone marrow, he has a light touch but his flavors really pop.
Vegetables feature as dessert (beetroot granita, for example).
